hook: The best profile writing feels spoken, not manufactured.
body: People respond better when your bio sounds like language a real person would actually use in life.

hook: Many profiles read like they were optimized in a vacuum, which quietly strips them of warmth.
body: Write like someone meeting a person, not like someone managing a campaign.

hook: Write like someone meeting a person, not like someone managing a campaign.
body: A direct sentence with a little personality usually feels more trustworthy than a polished line that no human would say aloud.

hook: A direct sentence with a little personality usually feels more trustworthy than a polished line that no human would say aloud.
body: Read your bio out loud and cut anything that sounds like branding instead of speech.
